Code-level; Stage-3 live verification pending.

capabilities.name: Lost reasons + win-rate analytics
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-04 (Stage-3 evidence): manage_leads update status=lost + lost_reason='competitor'/lost_note stored on the lead; a GET confirmed BOTH fields persist (lost_reason='price', lost_note='EPIC persistence check note'); re-opening (status=lead) cleared BOTH lost_reason and lost_note back to null (confirmed via GET). Mechanism: leads.lost_reason/lost_note (migration 20260704110000); LostReasonDialog prompts on the lost transition (LeadDetailPage select + LeadKanban drop onto is_lost stage); manage_leads accepts lost_reason/lost_note (agent-execute executeLeadsAction); win-rate + lost-reason rollup in lead_pipeline_review (win_loss block)
capabilities.notes: Built 2026-07-04 per crm-odoo.md §3 (taxonomy: price/timing/competitor/no_response/other + free-text note, Odoo crm.lost.reason pattern). Odoo's archive/Restore semantics approximated by status=lost + clear-on-reopen rather than active=False. Minor cosmetic gap (not blocking): the manage_leads update response echoes lost_reason but not lost_note — the write persists correctly (GET-confirmed), only the response payload omits it.

capabilities.name: Duplicate detection + merge
capabilities.verify: find_duplicate_leads + merge_leads RPCs (migration 20260616120000, normalize_email re-emitted forward-dated 20260704183000 to defeat ledger drift); merge VERIFIED LIVE on rzhj 2026-07-04 (two plus-address alias leads epicdedup+a/+b, merge_leads summed score 5+5→10 on the survivor and deleted the duplicate).
capabilities.notes: LIVE VERIFICATION FOUND A DRIFT BUG 2026-07-04: merge works, but DETECTION was broken — find_duplicate_leads returned no pair for the plus-address aliases because the DEPLOYED normalize_email('x+tag@d') returned the address UNCHANGED (the +tag strip was missing). Direct probe confirmed: normalize_email('epicdedup+a@example.com') → 'epicdedup+a@example.com' (should be 'epicdedup@example.com'). Root cause is ledger drift — the correct body exists in 20260616120000 but is back-dated below rzhj's ledger HEAD and was skipped, while merge_leads happened to be current (a drift MIX). Fixed: forward-dated 20260704183000 re-emits all three dedup functions verbatim. Stays partial pending live re-verify of detection after deploy (Lovable MCP down at fix time). SECONDARY robustness bug noted: manage_leads action=get on a non-existent lead crashes with 'Cannot coerce the result to a single JSON object' (a .single() that should be .maybeSingle()) instead of a clean not-found. Odoo crm.lead has a Merge action; email compare normalizes plus-addressing + case so gmail-style aliases collapse.
